name: creative-toolkit
description: Reusable creative agents for icon design, data visualization, and device mockups. Brand-configurable with NBG defaults.

icon-designer.description: Generates SVG icons — solid fill, monochrome, geometric. Default brand: NBG.

infographic-specialist.description: Creates charts, diagrams, KPI dashboards, and data visualizations. Default brand: NBG.

device-mockup.description: Creates pixel-perfect iPhone device mockups from app screenshots.

iphone_mockup.description: Create pixel-perfect iPhone mockups from screenshots
